title: OFSI General Licence INT/2025/7598960
body: " OFSI General Licence INT/2025/7598960 OFSI General Licence INT/2025/7598960 Publication notice   On 22 October 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/7598960 under regulation 64 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) which permits a Person to continue business operations involving the Named Subsidiaries. "
